name: Pineapple Muffin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
In a large mixing bowl, cream together the shortening, sugar, and egg until light and fluffy. Stir in the crushed pineapple with juice.
Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg, then stir into the batter. Mix well.
Stir in the chopped walnuts.
Drop by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets.
Bake for 8-10 minutes at 350°F. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: 5 dozen
Note: Heather Hephner, Associate Editor, Food & Family Life, Better Home and Gardens, Des Moines, IA; Randy Shearer
